notes: Phase 4 is a validation-only phase — all implementation was completed in Phases 1-3. V2-P4-A: Full benchmark suite executed — 50 benchmark tests (25 routing-benchmark + 25 grounded-knowledge) all pass. V2-P4-B: Tool routing correctness verified — system prompts contain explicit course routing keywords, platform differentiation rules, and negative constraint (Do NOT use getEdLightInitiatives for course listings). V2-P4-C: Streaming stability confirmed — all 6 regression tests in sandra.test.ts pass covering message ordering, second-iteration tokens, session persistence, multiple tools, error handling, max iterations. V2-P4-D: Final gate — npm test 432/432 passing (47 files), npx tsc --noEmit zero errors, npm run build succeeds (11 static pages + 6 API routes).
